title: Bright Studio Aristotelous Square Thessaloniki – Stunning 1-Bed Student Home

about.summary: Bright studio Aristotelous Square is located at Aristotelous 24A, City Centre Thessaloniki. This fully equipped private studio is ideal for one student.

sections.title: 🏠 Bright Studio Aristotelous Square
sections.content: Bright studio Aristotelous Square is a cozy, fully furnished student housing choice in City Centre Thessaloniki. Designed for one tenant, this private studio setup offers complete comfort and independence without the hassle of shared living.
highlights: Fully equipped: Features a double bed, wardrobe, dedicated laptop workspace, private kitchenware, air conditioning, and private bathroom.
Privacy & comfort: A self-contained studio on the 5th floor of an eclectic building with lift access.
Evergreen availability: Open for short or medium-term stays, with no restrictions to specific semesters.

sections.title: 📍 Location in City Centre Thessaloniki
sections.content: Living directly on Aristotelous Square connects you with the cultural center of Thessaloniki. Daily essentials — supermarkets, bakeries, pharmacies, cafes, and restaurants — are within a 2-minute walk, while the waterfront promenade is just steps away.
highlights: University access: Close to public transport routes, with Aristotle University and City College reachable in 20 minutes.
City life: Tsimiski shopping street, local taverns, and nightlife are easy to reach on foot.

sections.title: 🎓 Ideal for Erasmus Students & Nomads
sections.content:
This bright studio Aristotelous Square is ideal for Erasmus students coming for their studies, and remote digital nomads seeking a quiet central workspace. For university info, see the official Aristotle University of Thessaloniki page and the City College Europe Campus website.

To compare other properties in the same building, view our compact Aristotelous studio or our terrace Aristotelous studio.

sections.title: Bills & Services
sections.content:
Maintenance, water, heating and Wi-Fi are included. Electricity is paid separately, and cleaning service is available every two weeks.

We will be happy to welcome you in Thessaloniki. Reach out through the contact host button.

house_rules.additional_rules_info: No smoking. Tenant type: students and working professionals. Not suitable for couples or double occupancy. Playing musical instruments not allowed. Age and gender: no preference.

seo.seo_title: Bright Studio Aristotelous Square, Thessaloniki: Cozy 1-Bed
seo.seo_description: Bright studio Aristotelous Square, Thessaloniki — stunning 1 Bed, Wi-Fi, workspace. Ideal for Erasmus students and digital nomads.
